name: Ceramic Table Lamp with Knob Tan - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Light up your home with this Ceramic Table Lamp with Knobs from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. With a 17.75-inch height, this stylish table lamp features a white empire-shaped shade atop a tan-colored cylindrical ceramic base with decorative knobs on the sides and antique brass-finish neck and finial for a chic mixed-material look. The convenient inline rocker switch offers one-way on/off control, and the five-foot cord provides flexible placement.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
